$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json state get missing.entity
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: internal: entity_not_found (request_id=<ULID>)
Usage:
  switchyard state get <entity-id> [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for get

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

internal: entity_not_found (request_id=<ULID>)
